audits.label: fastapi
audits.note: Python web framework; 48 modules, 110 internal edges. Top-1 audited. Verdict: STRUCTURAL DEBT on the 18-module routing cycle.

audits.label: flask
audits.note: Python web framework; 23 modules. Top-1 audited. Verdict: STRUCTURAL DEBT on the 20-module core cycle.

audits.label: redis
audits.note: C in-memory data store; 150 modules, 396 #include edges. Top-1 audited. Verdict: STRUCTURAL DEBT on the 27-module C-core cycle.

audits.label: pentesting
audits.note: Python pentest-agent framework; 116 modules. Top-3 audited. All 3 verdicts: JUSTIFIED VIOLATION via judge OVERRIDE — the LCOM=1.00 findings are dataclass/facade patterns where the metric misleads, and the judge said so.
